svg.title: Academic Research — Google ADK agent tree (Vertex AI)
svg.desc: Academic Research ADK sample as an agent tree: the academic_coordinator root agent (Gemini 2.5 Pro) with two AgentTool sub-agents, academic_websearch_agent (grounded by google_search) and academic_newresearch_agent.
svg.text: Academic Research — Google ADK agent tree (Vertex AI)
Root coordinator with two AgentTool sub-agents — mirrors the sample's own architecture diagram
